title: 31] To consider the nominations of: Mr. Michael T....
description: Full Committee Hearing on July 31, 2025 at 5:15 AM
text:
Full Committee Hearing
To consider the nominations of: Mr. Michael T. Powers to be Deputy Under Secretary of Defense (Comptroller); Dr. Amy E. Henninger to be Director of Operational Test and Evaluation, Department of Defense; Mr. David W. Denton, Jr. to be General Counsel of the Department of the Navy; and Mr. Benjamin C. Kohlmann to be Assistant Secretary of the Navy for Manpower and Reserve Affairs
